name: Vikram Chopra
tagline: Essays on pressure, judgment, ambition, and company building.
description: A home for essays and notes on building companies, making hard decisions, and staying steady under pressure.
intro: I write about building companies, making decisions under pressure, and staying clear-eyed while the stakes rise.
about: The work that matters most to me lives in the tension between intensity and steadiness: how to move fast without becoming frantic, and how to demand more without losing care for the people around the work.
footerNote: Built for long arguments, sharp ideas, and posts worth rereading.
